mapper.insert: merge into DO_DATA_PILED_MONITOR a using (select #{dataPiledSetting.dataName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as dataName, #{dataPiledSetting.dataWarehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as dataWare, #{dataPiledSetting.consumTopic,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as consumTopic, #{dataPiledSetting.consumGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as consumGroup, #{dataPiledSetting.pushHour,jdbcType=VARCHAR} as pushHour ) b on (a.DATA_NAME = b.dataName and a.DATA_WAREHOUSENAME = b.dataWare and a.CONSUM_TOPIC = b.consumTopic and a.CONSUM_GROUP = b.consumGroup and a.PUSH_HOUR = b.pushHour and a.INSERTTIME > DATE_TRUNC('day', CURRENT_DATE)) when matched then update set OFF_SET = #{dataPiledSetting.offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}, LOGSIZE = #{dataPiledSetting.logSize,jdbcType=INTEGER}, LAG = #{dataPiledSetting.lag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, PILED_RATE = #{dataPiledSetting.piledRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR} when not matched then insert (DATA_NAME,DATA_WAREHOUSENAME,CONSUM_TOPIC,CONSUM_GROUP,OFF_SET,LOGSIZE,LAG,PILED_RATE,PUSH_HOUR,INSERTTIME,DATA_TYPE) values (#{dataPiledSetting.dataName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataPiledSetting.dataWarehouseName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataPiledSetting.consumTopic,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataPiledSetting.consumGroup,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataPiledSetting.offset,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dataPiledSetting.logSize,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dataPiledSetting.lag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dataPiledSetting.piledRate,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataPiledSetting.pushHour,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENT_DATE, #{dataPiledSetting.dataType,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from DO_DATA_PILED_MONITOR where INSERTTIME < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '10 day')
mapper.select: select DATA_NAME, DATA_WAREHOUSENAME, CONSUM_TOPIC, CONSUM_GROUP, OFF_SET, LOGSIZE, LAG, PILED_RATE, PUSH_HOUR, to_char(INSERTTIME,'yyyyMMdd') as INSERTTIME, DATA_TYPE from DO_DATA_PILED_MONITOR where INSERTTIME > (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '#{days,jdbcType=INTEGER} day')
